logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1016] The critical path in module 'find_largest_component_hw_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_51_4' consists of the following: 'load' operation ('p.y', card_recognizer_hls.cpp:53) on array 'queue_y' [29] (3.25 ns) 'add' operation ('sh', C:\scratch\2022.2\hls_product\608\2022.2\src\shared\hls\clib/src/hls\utils/x_hls_utils.h:346) [62] (1.92 ns) 'select' operation ('ush') [66] (0.968 ns) 'lshr' operation ('r.V') [69] (0 ns) 'select' operation ('val') [74] (4.42 ns) 'sub' operation ('result.V') [75] (2.55 ns) 'select' operation ('result.V', C:\scratch\2022.2\hls_product\608\2022.2\src\shared\hls\clib/hlsmath/include/FloatingPoint\hls_case_IEEE754.h:59) [76] (0.698 ns) 'mul' operation ('mul_ln61_1', card_recognizer_hls.cpp:61) [120] (12.6 ns) 'add' operation ('nidx', card_recognizer_hls.cpp:61) [122] (2.17 ns) 'getelementptr' operation ('binary_addr_1', card_recognizer_hls.cpp:62) [124] (0 ns) 'load' operation ('binary_load_1', card_recognizer_hls.cpp:62) on array 'binary' [125] (3.25 ns)
Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1016 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1016.html
